summary: DHH shares a brief personal moment from an Easter family tradition of gathering and walking to the beach at sunset. He captures the scene with his camera, highlighting the beautiful light and showcasing his 50mm lens with a portrait of his cousin. The post is a simple, intimate snapshot of family life with no tech or business commentary.
key_points: Documents a family Easter tradition of gathering and walking to the beach at sunset
Highlights his enthusiasm for photography, particularly using a 50mm prime lens
A rare purely personal post with no connection to tech, business, or software
money_quotes: It's a family tradition to convene at the second of the Easter days.
The light was as usual amazing and luckily I had my camera with me.
key_insight: A rare personal glimpse showing DHH's life beyond tech — family traditions, photography, and appreciating simple moments at sunset.
